title: 10 best herbal capsules for psoriasis
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for psoriasis are natural supplements derived from plants, herbs, and botanicals that help alleviate symptoms of this chronic skin condition. These capsules contain ingredients such as turmeric, ginger, and green tea, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that reduce redness, itching, and scaling associated with psoriasis. Examples include Nature's Bounty Psoriasis Support and Doctor's Best Psoriasis Formula, which can improve the quality of life for individuals suffering from psoriasis by reducing symptoms and promoting clearer skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain calendula, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that soothes irritated skin. The capsules work by reducing redness, swelling, and inflammation associated with psoriasis, thereby providing relief from itching and burning sensations. Additionally, the antioxidant properties of pot marigold may help to protect the skin against damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy skin cell growth and regeneration.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Pot marigold contains anti-inflammatory compounds like kaempferol and quercetin, which help reduce inflammation in the skin, thereby alleviating symptoms of psoriasis such as redness, swelling, and itching.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in pot marigold capsules, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, help neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthier skin.

Wound-healing properties: Pot marigold has been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin ulcers, and its wound-healing properties may also be beneficial for psoriasis patients by promoting the healing of skin lesions and cracks caused by dryness and irritation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the pot marigold plant have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with psoriasis.
Flowers: Pot marigold flowers contain flavonoids and carotenoids that help soothe skin irritation and promote wound healing, making them an effective treatment for psoriasis.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with psoriasis because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. The active compound curcumin in turmeric has been shown to inhibit the production of inflammatory cytokines, thereby alleviating symptoms such as redness, itching, and scaling associated with psoriasis. Additionally, turmeric's antioxidant effects help to protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy and balanced immune response. As a result, herbal turmeric capsules can be a valuable natural remedy for managing psoriasis symptoms and improving overall skin health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Curcumin, a key compound in turmeric, reduces inflammation in the body, which is a primary cause of psoriasis symptoms like redness, swelling, and itching.

Antioxidant properties: Turmeric's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage skin cells and contribute to psoriasis development, promoting healthy skin cell growth and turnover.

Immunomodulatory effects: Turmeric's ability to regulate the immune system helps reduce inflammation and prevent excessive activation of immune cells, which can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms like plaque formation and scaling.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them effective in reducing psoriasis symptoms.
Barks: Contain bioactive compounds like gingerols and shogaols, which help alleviate inflammation and skin irritation associated with psoriasis.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Licorice capsules helps with psoriasis because of its anti-inflammatory properties, which can reduce redness and swelling in the skin. The herb licorice root contains a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory molecules that contribute to psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, licorice root may help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing the appearance of scales and lesions associated with psoriasis. Overall, herbal licorice capsules can provide a natural and gentle approach to managing psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Herbal licorice capsules contain a compound called glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce redness and swelling associated with psoriasis.

Immunomodulatory property: Licorice root extracts have been shown to modulate the immune system, reducing the overactive response that can contribute to psoriasis symptoms such as skin thickening and scaling.
Antioxidant property: Herbal licorice capsules contain antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage skin cells and exacerbate psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Licorice roots are used in herbal remedies due to their anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce skin inflammation associated with psoriasis.
Barks: The barks of the licorice plant contain glycyrrhizin, a compound that has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective for soothing psoriasis symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Oregon grape capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain anthocyanosides, which have potent anti-inflammatory properties that reduce redness and swelling associated with the condition. The capsules also exhibit antimicrobial activity, helping to combat fungal and bacterial infections that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, Oregon grape has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, further reducing inflammation and promoting a calming effect on the skin.
remedy_properties: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which are common underlying causes of psoriasis flare-ups.
Berberine: This alkaloid compound has been shown to suppress the production of inflammatory cytokines, reducing skin irritation and discomfort associated with psoriasis.

Berbamine: Berbamine, a compound related to berberine, exhibits anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help calm down the immune system's overactive response that contributes to psoriasis.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in berberine, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective against psoriatic skin inflammation.
Barks: Contain alkaloids like berbamine and columbamine, which have been shown to reduce inflammation and relieve symptoms of psoriasis.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: German chamomile capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain apigenin, an anti-inflammatory compound that soothes and calms the skin. This natural herb reduces redness, swelling, and irritation associated with psoriatic lesions, promoting a healthy and balanced skin environment. Additionally, German chamomile's antiseptic properties help combat infections and reduce scarring, resulting in smoother, clearer skin. By incorporating these capsules into your regimen, you can alleviate the discomfort and visual symptoms of psoriasis, leading to improved overall well-being and confidence.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: German Chamomile's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with psoriasis, allowing for easier management of symptoms.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants in German Chamomile may help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to psoriasis development and exacerbation, thereby promoting healthier skin.

Soothing and calming effects: German Chamomile's calming properties can help reduce stress and anxiety, common triggers for psoriasis flares, and promote relaxation, leading to improved overall well-being.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids that help to reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis.
Flowers: The flowers contain apigenin, an anti-inflammatory compound that helps to soothe skin irritation and promote healing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Narrow-leaved paperbark capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain powerful anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce redness, swelling, and irritation associated with this chronic skin condition. The capsules' natural extracts also exhibit potent antioxidant properties, which help to neutralize free radicals that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, narrow-leaved paperbark has been traditionally used to soothe itching, scaling, and flaking, providing relief from the discomfort and distress caused by psoriasis.
remedy_properties: Antibacterial and antifungal properties: Narrow-leaved paperbark's antibacterial and antifungal compounds, such as terpinen-4-ol, help combat the overgrowth of bacteria and fungi on the skin, which can contribute to psoriasis symptoms like itching and inflammation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The capsule's anti-inflammatory compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, may reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with psoriasis by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory molecules in the body.

Immune-modulatory effects: Narrow-leaved paperbark's immunomodulatory properties may help regulate an overactive immune response, which is thought to contribute to psoriasis development and exacerbation. This modulation can reduce inflammation and prevent further skin damage.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain a high concentration of bioactive compounds that help to soothe and calm irritated skin, making them an effective ingredient in treating psoriasis.
Barks: The barks of the narrow-leaved paperbark plant have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce redness and swelling associated with psoriasis, while also promoting wound healing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: European olive capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain a concentrated extract of Olea europaea, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The polyphenols present in the capsules have been shown to reduce inflammation, calm irritated skin, and promote healthy cell growth. By addressing the root causes of psoriasis, such as chronic inflammation and oxidative stress, these capsules may help alleviate symptoms like redness, itching, and scaling, leading to clearer, healthier-looking skin. Regular use can also help to improve overall skin health and reduce the frequency and severity of psoriasis flares.
remedy_properties: Oleuropein: This polyphenolic compound has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with psoriasis.
Oleanolic acid: This triterpene saponin has been shown to inhibit the activity of inflammatory enzymes and cytokines, thereby reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of psoriasis.
Hydroxytyrosol: This phenolic compound has demonstrated anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which can help regulate the immune response and reduce the severity of psoriatic lesions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, olive roots have been traditionally used to soothe skin conditions like psoriasis.
Seeds: Olive seeds contain antioxidants and fatty acids that help reduce inflammation and promote healing in psoriatic skin.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Plantain capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce redness and swelling in the skin. The capsules also have antioxidant properties, which help to combat free radicals that can exacerbate psoriasis symptoms. Additionally, plantain has been shown to modulate the immune system, which can help to regulate an overactive response that can contribute to psoriasis flare-ups. By reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy balance in the body, herbal plantain capsules can provide natural relief from psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Plantain's anti-inflammatory properties help reduce redness, swelling, and pain associated with psoriatic lesions, making it a valuable natural remedy for soothing skin irritation.

Antioxidant: Plantain's antioxidant compounds neutralize free radicals, which can contribute to oxidative stress that exacerbates psoriasis symptoms, reducing the risk of inflammation and cell damage.

Immunomodulatory: Plantain has been shown to modulate the immune system, helping to reduce excessive inflammation and immune response, which is often characteristic of psoriasis, and promoting a more balanced immune function.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help to reduce redness and swelling associated with psoriasis.
Rhyzomes: Containing natural steroids, the rhyzomes assist in reducing inflammation and promoting skin health.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pomegranate capsules help with psoriasis because of their potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The capsules contain punicic acid, a key compound found in pomegranates that has been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. This can help alleviate symptoms of psoriasis such as redness, itching, and scaling. Additionally, pomegranate's antioxidant properties may also help protect the skin from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy skin and reducing the appearance of psoriatic lesions.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pomegranate's high antioxidant content helps reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to inflammation and damage caused by psoriasis.
Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pomegranate, such as ellagic acid and punicalagins, may help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with psoriasis.

Immune-modulating properties: Pomegranate's immunomodulatory effects can help regulate the immune response and reduce the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines, which contribute to psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help to reduce inflammation and promote skin healing.
Barks: Contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating psoriatic symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English oak capsules helps with psoriasis because they contain extracts of the English oak tree, specifically urushiol, a compound that has been shown to reduce inflammation and promote healing. The capsules help to calm the immune system's overactive response that characterizes psoriasis, reducing redness, itching, and scaling. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of English oak may help to soothe irritated skin and promote the growth of healthy new tissue, leading to improved overall skin health and a reduced appearance of psoriasis symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Oak bark contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory effects, which may help reduce redness, swelling, and itching associated with psoriasis.
Antioxidant: Oak bark's antioxidant properties can help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, potentially reducing the severity of psoriasis symptoms.

Wound healing: Oak bark has been traditionally used to promote wound healing due to its ability to stimulate collagen synthesis, improve blood flow, and reduce inflammation - which may also be beneficial for managing psoriasis-related lesions.
remedy_parts: Roots: Oak roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to reduce inflammation and itching associated with psoriasis due to their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
Barks: The barks of oak trees contain flavonoids, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and immune-modulating effects, making them effective in soothing symptoms of psoriasis.
